verses.latin_vulgate: Voce mea ad Dominum clamavi,  voce mea ad Dominum deprecatus sum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ק֭וֹלִי אֶל־יְהֹוָ֣ה אֶזְעָ֑ק ק֝וֹלִ֗י אֶל־יְהֹוָ֥ה אֶתְחַנָּֽן׃
verses.king_james: I cried unto the Lord with my voice; with my voice unto the Lord did I make my supplication.

verses.latin_vulgate: Effundo in conspectu ejus orationem meam,  et tribulationem meam ante ipsum pronuntio :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶשְׁפֹּ֣ךְ לְפָנָ֣יו שִׂיחִ֑י צָ֝רָתִ֗י לְפָנָ֥יו אַגִּֽיד׃
verses.king_james: I poured out my complaint before him; I shewed before him my trouble.

verses.latin_vulgate: in deficiendo ex me spiritum meum,  et tu cognovisti semitas meas.  In via hac qua ambulabam  absconderunt laqueum mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּהִתְעַטֵּ֬ף עָלַ֨י ׀ רוּחִ֗י וְאַתָּה֮ יָדַ֢עְתָּ נְֽתִיבָ֫תִ֥י בְּאֹֽרַח־ז֥וּ אֲהַלֵּ֑ךְ טָמְנ֖וּ פַ֣ח לִֽי׃
verses.king_james: When my spirit was overwhelmed within me, then thou knewest my path. In the way wherein I walked have they privily laid a snare for me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Considerabam ad dexteram, et videbam,  et non erat qui cognosceret me :  periit fuga a me,  et non est qui requirat animam meam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַבֵּ֤יט יָמִ֨ין ׀ וּרְאֵה֮ וְאֵֽין־לִ֢י מַ֫כִּ֥יר אָבַ֣ד מָנ֣וֹס מִמֶּ֑נִּי אֵ֖ין דּוֹרֵ֣שׁ לְנַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.king_james: I looked on my right hand, and beheld, but there was no man that would know me: refuge failed me; no man cared for my soul.

verses.latin_vulgate: Clamavi ad te, Domine ;  dixi : Tu es spes mea,  portio mea in terra viventium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זָעַ֥קְתִּי אֵלֶ֗יךָ יְ֫הֹוָ֥ה אָ֭מַרְתִּי אַתָּ֣ה מַחְסִ֑י חֶ֝לְקִ֗י בְּאֶ֣רֶץ הַחַיִּֽים׃
verses.king_james: I cried unto thee, O Lord: I said, Thou art my refuge and my portion in the land of the living.

verses.latin_vulgate: Intende ad deprecationem meam,  quia humiliatus sum nimis.  Libera me a persequentibus me,  quia confortati sunt super me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַקְשִׁ֤יבָה ׀ אֶֽל־רִנָּתִי֮ כִּֽי־דַלּ֢וֹתִ֫י מְאֹ֥ד הַצִּילֵ֥נִי מֵרֹדְפַ֑י כִּ֖י אָמְצ֣וּ מִמֶּֽנִּי׃
verses.king_james: Attend unto my cry; for I am brought very low: deliver me from my persecutors; for they are stronger than I.

verses.latin_vulgate: Educ de custodia animam meam  ad confitendum nomini tuo ;  me exspectant justi donec retribuas mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֘וֹצִ֤יאָה מִמַּסְגֵּ֨ר ׀ נַפְשִׁי֮ לְהוֹד֢וֹת אֶת־שְׁ֫מֶ֥ךָ בִּ֭י יַכְתִּ֣רוּ צַדִּיקִ֑ים כִּ֖י תִגְמֹ֣ל עָלָֽי׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Bring my soul out of prison, that I may praise thy name: the righteous shall compass me about; for thou shalt deal bountifully with me.
